reviews.review_title: I got accused for no reason at all
reviews.review_description:
Avoid this game at all costs.

I was running around in code 2 with a moderator and I heard a kid repeatedly say the N word. The moderator was trying to figure out who it was and the kid who said it accused me of saying it. And the next day I got banned for three weeks. ￼￼These moderators need to do better. This has to be the worst experience I’ve received in any VR game. ￼

Ive made a raw footage video about this game. Though, Ive been having trouble trying to identify an entity I found. It seemed to be a giant golden Lucy, but I'm not sure. I have a video where me and my friend found it right here. https://youtu.be/jSe482ruT-c?si=NxIm3CfoNiTvvVm9 

If you know what the first one I came across was, please let me know.

besides the fact that it wants you to rate the game 5 stars, and that disco is way too overrated, the game is auctally very good along with the events that are chaotic and exciting. my favorite event is probably “ God’s Mistake “ along with a couple other ones. i rate this game truthfully and the game is underrated. the maps are very nice and detailed, there are so many monsters to explore, and the game is quite scary except for disco. disco is not scary. disco is not fun. well disco is fun when your in code “ 100” because theres like 83 people running from disco at a time. i hate when i get jumpscared i either go back to the menu screen or just get kicked off the app. can you make it so it doesnt do that? it’s really annoying because i play for probably a couple hours straight, and it makes the game kinda boring. although other than that it is wonderful and the community is mid i guess? i recommend this game alot.

I dont know if this was a game issue or if it was just my vr. So basically i was playing this game yesterday (baring in mind i’ve had this game for a while now and never had any issues with it) so anyway yesterday i was in the code 100 or 1 (i cant remember but it was one of them) and everyone was in mines getting all the monsters. While people was getting Plasma, i went off to go and get Green Bean. Once they got Plasma, i brought Green Bean down to them and we was all just running in circles until my game started lagging badly, and i dont mean just a bit of lag, it was bad that my screen froze for like 5 seconds then unfroze for 1 second and just kept repeating. After that, i got kicked, i didnt think much of it i just thought my game crashed or the monsters killed me so i just took my vr off my head and put it on charge and then i kept hearing it turn on and off so i went to see what was happening and it just kept powering on and off, so when it was on i tried to press things but my controllers wouldn’t show and then my screen was flashing between passthrough and a black screen. I searched up what to do and people said it might be in a boot loop so what i did was pressed the volume down button and the power off button until i saw a list of things and pressed the top one which said boot something. After that, it didnt work, the same thing kept happening to my vr which caused it to over heat until it died. I did more research and people said to Factory reset my vr. I really didnt want to do this but at the end of the day i had already lost my stuff and there was nothing i could do about it so i did the factory reset and it worked. Nothing wrong with my vr now but i just need to re download things (yes i still have all my cosmetics from gorilla tag). Its just like getting a new vr to set up. Im just glad i have fixed it.

reviews.review_title: Chaos with a sprinkle of terror.
reviews.review_description: Honestly one of the BEST gtag horrors out there, Super goofy and fun to run for your virtual life from monsters and entities that want you to either load the game again after getting killed, or just kick you from the whole game. The community is meh and code 100 can be laggy sometimes (code 100 allows 100 people total and it gets VERY laggy). I also love how many things there are. My new favorite hobby is to do roulette (a shrine that spawns anything from a fast little thing to serverwiping demons like NULL and a gargantuan-sized entity) and then either run to the shop, or hop inside mines and pray that nothing follows you. And also this game can be loud so watch out for noises and keep the volume around the middle-ish area to prevent uncomfortably loud sounds. Over all of it in total: 5 stars and a high recommendation for anybody wanting a decent gtag horror.
